title: Client-side-only calculators (budget worksheet, debt-payoff illustrator, savings-goal) + no-data-egress test
context: The project's strongest privacy guarantee is structural: it never asks for, transmits, or stores a user's personal financial data. The interactive tools (budget worksheet, debt-payoff illustrator, savings-goal calculator) compute entirely in the browser with no backend, no network calls with user data, and no analytics on financial inputs. An optional 'save my numbers' feature is local-device-only, opt-in, and never uploaded. Each tool carries the not-advice framing and an 'illustration, not a recommendation' label. A no-data-egress test (network + storage) is a required release gate for each tool.
objective: Build the three privacy-preserving, client-side-only interactive calculators (budget worksheet, debt-payoff illustrator, savings-goal calculator) with a passing no-data-egress test for each, not-advice framing, and WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Budget worksheet: client-side-only income/expense calculation with labeled illustrative examples; no data transmitted or persisted server-side
Debt-payoff illustrator: shows illustrative payoff timelines (e.g., snowball vs. avalanche approaches) labeled as 'illustration, not a recommendation'; no data transmitted or persisted server-side
Savings-goal calculator: client-side-only savings timeline calculator; no data transmitted or persisted server-side
Optional 'save my numbers' is local-device-only (localStorage/IndexedDB), requires explicit opt-in, is clearly labeled as staying on the device, and is never uploaded
No-data-egress test (network + storage) passes for each tool as a release gate: asserts no financial input is sent over the network and no financial data is written to storage without explicit opt-in
Each tool carries 'Educational information, not financial advice' framing and an 'illustration, not a recommendation' label; linter-clean
WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility requirements met; keyboard navigable; screen-reader friendly
output: A merged PR adding the three client-side-only calculators (tools/) with no-data-egress tests, not-advice framing, accessibility compliance, and documentation of the privacy-by-construction design.
